title: phyllanthus udoricola
intro: Phyllanthus udoricola, also known as the Asian swampweed, is a species of plant in the family Phyllanthaceae. It has been traditionally used in Asian medicine, particularly in China and India, for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antioxidant effects. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving gastrointestinal disorders, and protecting against liver damage. Phyllanthus udoricola can be prepared as a herbal tea, capsule, or extract, and is often used in traditional Chinese medicine to treat various ailments.
